case_title: STATE OF OREGON, EMPLOYMENT DEPARTMENT VS. JEFF BUCHER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FOR APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; PARTY SERVED JEFF BUCHER DBA BUCHER TRUCKING FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF OREGON, EMPLOYMENT DEPARTMENT
